subcodes.first_line: That which hath appeared hath caused such tumult amongst the tribes of earth and heaven, and hath so agitated all things, that the dwellers of earth raised their lamentations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر ما اضطربت عنه قبائل الملک و الملکوت و ضجت الاشیا و ناحت سکان الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @call to action, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
